project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game with Express + WebSocket + SQLite backend
test_framework: No test framework currently set up. Verification via build.
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to ensure TypeScript compiles and Vite bundles without errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Node v22.
contribution_requirements: Push directly to main branch. No PR required.
key_patterns: Zustand store (src/store/gameStore.ts) is the central state management. Components in src/components/. Server is Express+WebSocket in src/server/index.ts with SQLite via src/server/database.ts. i18n system with en.ts and es.ts. CSS in src/App.css (single large CSS file). All game types in src/types/game.ts. Config in src/config.ts exports API_BASE and WS_BASE derived from window.location.hostname:3001.
directory_structure: src/ contains: App.tsx (routing), App.css (all styles), components/ (UI), store/gameStore.ts (Zustand), server/ (Express+WS+SQLite), types/ (game.ts), i18n/ (en.ts, es.ts, index.ts), utils/ (gameLogic.ts), config.ts, img/ (assets)
